# TradeScale Plus

> A South Wales studio that designs and builds bespoke AI systems, smart websites, automations and custom software for businesses. Built fast with AI, shaped around your business, never from a template.

TradeScale Plus is an AI build studio based in Carmarthenshire, South Wales, serving businesses across Swansea, Cardiff, Llanelli, Carmarthen, Neath, Newport, Bridgend and Pembroke, and remotely UK-wide. We design and build custom AI systems and software: smart websites, AI chatbots, 24/7 AI phone receptionists, all-channel inboxes, custom CRMs, business automations, dashboards and bespoke apps.

Everything is built bespoke around the client's business, and because we build with AI most projects go live in days to a couple of weeks rather than the months a traditional agency quotes.

## Flagship build (proof of capability)

We have already designed and built a complete, working, multi-tenant AI platform end to end: an AI receptionist and sales assistant for car dealers that answers calls and messages across eight channels, runs the customer pipeline, books appointments and handles billing. It shows the depth of custom system we can build for any business. See it at https://tradescaleplus.com/ame.html

## What we build

- Smart, AI-powered websites
- AI chatbots and 24/7 AI phone receptionists
- All-channel inboxes (SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, web chat, email)
- Custom CRMs and sales pipelines
- Business process automations and dashboards
- Bespoke apps and custom software

## Service area

Carmarthenshire and South Wales: Swansea, Cardiff, Llanelli, Carmarthen, Neath, Newport, Bridgend, Pembroke. Remote UK-wide.

## Pricing

Every build is bespoke and priced to the job. Free, no-obligation consultation to scope it and give a clear price.
